architecture.summary: The tuned lens is an interpretability method that decodes intermediate hidden states of frozen pretrained transformers into vocabulary distributions. For each transformer layer, a learned affine transformation (translator) maps the hidden state from that layer's representation space into the final layer's representation space, where it is composed with the pretrained unembedding matrix to produce a distribution over tokens. This enables layer-by-layer analysis of how model predictions evolve during inference without modifying the base model.

biblio.title: Eliciting Latent Predictions from Transformers with the Tuned Lens

claims.statement: tuned lens predictions have substantially lower perplexity than logit lens predictions across language models with up to 20B parameters
logit lens bias measured by KL divergence between marginal distributions is around 4 to 5 bits for most layers of GPT-Neo-2.7B, whereas tuned lens shows significantly lower bias
tuned lens translators can zero-shot transfer to nearby layers with only modest increase in perplexity; transfer penalties are low especially for nearby layers
strong correlation (Spearman ρ) between causal influence of features on tuned lens and their influence on the model itself

baseline.name: logit lens and Simplified Relative Mahalanobis baseline

claims.dataset: nine multiple-choice tasks (ARC-Easy, ARC-Challenge, BoolQ, MC TACO, MNLI, QNLI, QQP, SciQ, SST-2)
claims.statement: tuned lens achieves perfect or near-perfect AUROC (>0.99) on five out of nine prompt injection detection tasks
tuned lens prediction depth correlates with iteration learned (difficulty metric) on all 11 tasks investigated; outperforms logit lens on 8 out of 11 tasks
tuned lens training is fast: code trains a full set of probes on a single 8A40 GPU node in under an hour

logit lens fails to elicit useful information from GPT-Neo, BLOOM, and OPT 125M; logit lens outputs are often the input token rather than plausible continuation tokens in more than half the layers of BLOOM and OPT 125M
